API Reference

PhoenixmlDb .NET API — interfaces, classes, and usage patterns

#API Reference

This section provides detailed API documentation for PhoenixmlDb's core classes and interfaces.

#Core Classes

#XmlDatabase

The main entry point for working with PhoenixmlDb.

#DatabaseOptions

#API Topics

# Container API

Create, configure, and manage document containers.

# Document API

Store, retrieve, and delete XML/JSON documents.

# Query API

Execute XQuery queries and process results.

# Index API

Create and manage indexes for query optimization.

# Transaction API

ACID transactions and concurrent access control.

# XSLT API

XsltTransformer — stream-based transforms, result document handling, source/mode selection, and collection binding.

#Quick Reference

#Common Operations

#Error Handling

#Interfaces

#IContainer

#ITransaction

#IQueryResult

#Thread Safety

Operation

Thread Safe

Read queries

Yes (concurrent reads allowed)

Write operations

No (single writer at a time)

Create/delete container

No

Read-only transactions

Yes (multiple concurrent)

Read-write transactions

No (serialized)

#Performance Guidelines

  1. Reuse XmlDatabase instance - Don't create/dispose frequently

  2. Use read-only transactions - When only reading

  3. Batch writes - Group multiple writes in one transaction

  4. Create indexes - For frequently queried paths

  5. Use parameters - Avoid query string concatenation

#Next Steps

Management

Operations

Execution

API Documents Document operations

API Queries Query execution
